objectives: Build mx20022-validate crate with real IBAN, BIC, length, and pattern validation
Implement RuleRegistry for composable rule dispatch
Pass cargo check, clippy -D warnings, fmt check, and all tests
constraints: Clippy pedantic with several allows pre-configured in workspace
important_facts: Rule::id() returns &str on the trait; impls returning static literals should use &'static str (clippy::unnecessary_literal_bound)
PatternRule::id() returns &self.rule_id (String field) so uses &str tied to self - fine
Generated model files need #![allow(clippy::large_enum_variant)] - added to head_001_001_04.rs, pacs_002_001_14.rs, pacs_008_001_13.rs
mx20022-codegen/src/ir/lower.rs needed PascalCase doc backtick fix
mx20022-parse/src/envelope.rs had pre-existing clippy issues (single_match_else, manual_let_else, doc_markdown) - all fixed
bah_deserialize_from_fixture test in mx20022-parse was ALREADY FAILING before our changes (pre-existing bug)
decisions_made: Rule trait uses &str return (not &'static str) to accommodate PatternRule's dynamic ID from a String field; static impls use &'static str covariance
LengthRangeRule is a convenience type combining min+max checks; emits MIN_LENGTH/MAX_LENGTH rule_ids (not LENGTH_RANGE) so registry lookups work
PatternRule anchors patterns with ^(?:pattern)$ to match XSD full-string semantics
IBAN validation strips whitespace (normalises spaced format) before checking
ConstraintSet stores Vec<FieldConstraint> (not HashMap) to support multiple constraints per path
Added #![allow(clippy::large_enum_variant)] at file level on generated files rather than boxing variants (avoids API changes)
risks_issues: bah_deserialize_from_fixture in mx20022-parse is pre-existing failure: unrelated to validate crate

iteration.summary: Built the complete mx20022-validate crate from scratch. Implemented ValidationError/Severity/ValidationResult error types, a Rule trait with IBAN (ISO 13616 mod-97), BIC (ISO 9362), MinLength, MaxLength, LengthRange, and Pattern (regex-based) implementations, a RuleRegistry for named rule dispatch, and a schema layer (ConstraintSet + SchemaValidator) that wires constraints to rules. Also fixed 7 pre-existing clippy issues in mx20022-codegen, mx20022-model, and mx20022-parse that blocked the workspace clippy target. All 55 unit tests and 14 doc tests pass. cargo check, clippy, and fmt all clean.
outputs_produced: regex dep added to workspace and validate crate
Pre-existing clippy fixes in 4 other files
55 unit tests + 14 doc tests all passing
next_actions: Add scheme-specific validation (FedNow, SEPA, CBPR) in src/schemes/
Implement Validator trait over generated message types (typed validation, not just string fields)
